name: @blindspotlab/stackbrief
description: Offline repository intelligence CLI for source-cited architectural briefs before code changes.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test bin/cli.test.js dist/packages/core/src/git.test.js dist/packages/scanner/src/scanner.test.js dist/packages/scanner/src/frameworks/nextjs.test.js dist/packages/knowledge/src/knowledge.test.js dist/packages/knowledge/src/module-resolution.test.js dist/packages/knowledge/src/external-api.test.js dist/packages/intelligence/src/repository-intelligence.test.js dist/packages/intelligence/src/repository-intelligence.integration.test.js dist/packages/brief/src/change-brief.test.js dist/packages/cli/src/index.test.js

author: Mojeeb Titilayo (https://mojeeb.xyz), BlindspotLab (https://blindspotlab.xyz)
